text.title: Methodology Corpus Licence Bundle — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output spec.

list.item: Input: Signed customer plan + scope ask.
Action: Record customer id, plan tier, requested domains, named contact.
Output: Bundle stub with deal metadata.
Decision gate: If plan not yet signed, pause and route to sales.
Input: Tier-manifest, slug counts.
Action: Enumerate (tiers, domains, slug count) the deal covers.
Output: Bundle.scope fully populated.
Decision gate: If scope > geek tier baseline, route to legal for special terms.
Input: Customer's downstream model.
Action: Pick redistribution stance + attribution requirement + placement.
Output: Bundle.redistribution + Bundle.attribution populated.
Decision gate: If customer wants re-licensing, escalate to founder-level approval.
Input: Telemetry options.
Action: Pick log-line / telemetry endpoint / self-attestation; document evidence format.
Output: Bundle.audit populated with concrete hook.
Decision gate: If telemetry isn't feasible, fall back to quarterly self-attestation form.
Input: Approver assignment.
Action: Set cadence + named approver; both Faion + customer sign.
Output: Signed bundle stored in deal-records repo.
Decision gate: If renewal not signed by cadence, freeze corpus access until resolved.
